description: Employee count by department for org chart.
purpose: Provides headcount breakdown by department for HR dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT ehr_em_department_id AS department_id, COUNT(*) AS headcount FROM mt_ehr_employee WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND ehr_em_status IN ('probation','active','on_leave') GROUP BY ehr_em_department_id ORDER BY headcount DESC

purpose: Provides aggregate payroll data for financial reporting.
fromSql: SELECT ehr_pr_period AS period, COUNT(*) AS employee_count, COALESCE(SUM(ehr_pr_base_salary),0) AS total_base, COALESCE(SUM(ehr_pr_net_pay),0) AS total_net FROM mt_ehr_payroll WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND (#{params.period} IS NULL OR ehr_pr_period = #{params.period}) GROUP BY ehr_pr_period ORDER BY ehr_pr_period DESC
